etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "dislike" from "dis-" (not) + "like" from Old English "lician"
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Not liking; having mild aversion and dislike antipathy with averse presence
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Not liking → mild aversion → contemporary dislike antipathy and dislike aversion with averse presence
